sections.heading: Introduction
sections.content:
The Return Scepter is a non-consumable Warp Totem . It warps the Player directly outside of their Farmhouse .
It's purchasable from Krobus in the Sewers for data-sort-value="2000000"> 2,000,000g , making it the most expensive inventory item in the game and second most expensive item, only behind the Gold Clock . It functions similarly to the Warp Totem: Farm , but is not consumed when used and teleports the player to the Farmhouse door instead of the totem warp point.

sections.heading: Destination
sections.content: The player will be teleported to the door outside the Farmhouse , or to their own Cabin .

sections.heading: History
sections.content:
- 1.1 : Introduced.
- 1.4 : Fixed bug causing the game to freeze when using the Return Scepter while wearing a bathing suit inside the Spa .
- 1.5 : Farmhands using the Return Scepter are now returned to their own cabins instead of outside the host's farmhouse .

rows: The golden handle quivers with raw potential. Hold this scepter to the sky and return home at will.
Warp Totem: Beach, •, Warp Totem: Desert, •, Warp Totem: Farm, •, Warp Totem: Island, •, Warp Totem: Mountains
Desert Obelisk, •, Earth Obelisk, •, Farm Obelisk, •, Island Obelisk, •, Return Scepter, •, Water Obelisk
